note: worktree was dirty at task creation

Changes requested. Controller validation passed for npm run typecheck, npm run schema:check, npm run smoke:simulated-market-decision after sandbox escalation (23/23), and npm run smoke:simulated-market (26/26). However the implementation does not actually satisfy the documented sourceRef fallback contract: flywheel.ts sets const sourceRef = body.sourceRef ?? {}, then later resolves sourceRef ?? runInputSnapshot.sourceRef ?? {}, so when sourceRef is omitted the value is already {} and simulation_run.inputSnapshot.sourceRef is never used. The smoke only checks sourceRef is an object, so it misses this regression. Please preserve undefined until fallback resolution, add a smoke assertion where the created run has inputSnapshot.sourceRef and POST /operations/decisions omits sourceRef, then verify GET detail/list return that original sourceRef. Also align docs/code if any matchId vs simulationRunId optionality statement is intended to be enforced or legacy compatibility should remain.

Approved after revision. The prior sourceRef fallback bug is fixed: flywheel.ts now preserves omitted body.sourceRef until resolving against simulation_run.inputSnapshot.sourceRef, and smoke-simulated-market-decision asserts both detail and list fallback plus explicit sourceRef override. Controller reran validation: npm run typecheck passed; npm run schema:check valid; npm run smoke:simulated-market-decision passed 27/27; npm run smoke:simulated-market passed 26/26; npm run smoke:p2-api passed after sandbox escalation for localhost connection. Changed files are within T0017 allowed backend/docs paths; broader dirty worktree and generated temp workspaces were not reverted. Memory candidates were not accepted because they lack lifecycle metadata.
